message: fix(ci): remove secret-based job conditionals in release workflow

files.patch:
@@ -218,80 +218,3 @@ jobs:
             ## What's Changed
 
             See the automatically generated release notes below.
-
-  # ==========================================================================
-  # Notify Package Managers to Update
-  # ==========================================================================
-  notify-homebrew-tap:
-    name: Notify Homebrew Tap
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 5
-    needs: release
-    # Only run if HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN is configured
-    if: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN != '' }}
-    steps:
-      - name: Extract version from tag
-        id: version
-        run: |
-          if [ -n "${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}" ]; then
-            VERSION="${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}"
-            VERSION="${VERSION#v}"
-          else
-            VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}"
-          fi
-          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-
-      - name: Trigger formula update
-        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
-        with:
-          token: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/homebrew-tap
-          event-type: formula-update
-          client-payload: |
-            {
-              "tool": "xf",
-              "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
-            }
-
-      - name: Log dispatch
-        run: |
-          echo "Dispatched formula-update event to homebrew-tap"
-          echo "   Tool: xf"
-          echo "   Version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
-
-  notify-scoop-bucket:
-    name: Notify Scoop Bucket
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 5
-    needs: release
-    # Only run if SCOOP_BUCKET_TOKEN is configured
-    if: ${{ secrets.SCOOP_BUCKET_TOKEN != '' }}
-    steps:
-      - name: Extract version from tag
-        id: version
-        run: |
-          if [ -n "${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}" ]; then
-            VERSION="${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}"
-            VERSION="${VERSION#v}"
-          else
-            VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}"
-          fi
-          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-
-      - name: Trigger manifest update
-        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
-        with:
-          token: ${{ secrets.SCOOP_BUCKET_TOKEN }}
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/scoop-bucket
-          event-type: manifest-update
-          client-payload: |
-            {
-              "tool": "xf",
-              "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
-            }
-
-      - name: Log dispatch
-        run: |
-          echo "Dispatched manifest-update event to scoop-bucket"
-          echo "   Tool: xf"
-          echo "   Version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
